applied_optimizations.name: fp8_kscale_fallback
applied_optimizations.description: At all 4 mla_decode_fwd call sites (target_verify, draft_extend non-graph, draft_extend graph, forward_decode), replaced `q_scale=layer.k_scale, kv_scale=layer.k_scale` with `_k_scale = layer.k_scale if layer.k_scale is not None else self.k_scale` and `q_scale=_k_scale, kv_scale=_k_scale`. This prevents the assertion failure in asm_mla.cu:206 when layer.k_scale is None (the default in RadixAttention). self.k_scale is initialized to torch.tensor([1.0]) in AiterAttnBackend.__init__.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_2
attempted_but_failed.reason: Time has expired (negative remaining). The code fix was correctly applied at all 4 mla_decode_fwd call sites (replacing layer.k_scale with a fallback to self.k_scale when None), but could never be val
